title: Minimum playable interaction command chain
summary: Implement at least one real player interaction chain, such as selecting a lantern and prioritizing lamp work, with traceable command or documented adapter state and UI feedback.
acceptance: Player can select a lantern/resident/object and issue one meaningful action from the HUD command surface
The action reaches an existing protocol/simulation command path or a reviewed, documented local adapter that is explicitly non-authoritative and traceable
Read-model or shell state changes visibly as a result, including queued/action feedback and a structured reason
The implementation does not fake world authority, bypass Simulation Worker ownership, or claim final game balance
E2E tests cover the full chain from selection to command/action feedback in zh-CN and en

history.details: Implemented select-to-HUD local lamp-priority action chain with shell-local adapter evidence, en/zh-CN feedback, debug payload, unit coverage, web-shell E2E 12/12, and quality gate passing

changes_requested: Medium: queued shell-local playableAction survives Load Save even though the M6 gate save envelope does not serialize it, leaving stale action feedback/debug after restore; clear it on load and cover save-load after queued action
Addressed reviewer change request by clearing session-local playableAction on save load, added queue->save/load E2E coverage, reran web-shell E2E 12/12, quality, handoff, validate, and diff check
verified: No blocking findings; reviewer-requested save/load local-action clearing confirmed
Merged b0780e1 into main; validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main; web-shell E2E passed 12/12 on the same task commit before merge

forbiddenPaths: unreviewed public Worker protocol or save schema changes
claiming public save compatibility or final release readiness

review.summary: No blocking findings; reviewer-requested save/load local-action clearing confirmed

integration.summary: Merged b0780e1 into main; validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main; web-shell E2E passed 12/12 on the same task commit before merge
